<div align="center">

# 🚀 Nexus

### The Unified Platform for Web3 Development

Build, deploy, manage, and secure blockchain applications from one powerful platform.

![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue.svg)
![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Planning-orange)
![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-0.1.0-green)
![Contributions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Contributions-Welcome-brightgreen)

</div>

---

## 🌍 Overview

Nexus is a modern all-in-one Web3 development platform designed to simplify blockchain application development.

Instead of switching between multiple tools, developers can build, test, deploy, and manage smart contracts from a unified workspace.

---

## ✨ Vision

Empower developers with a complete platform for creating secure, scalable, and innovative decentralized applications.

---

## 🎯 Key Features

- 🔐 Secure Authentication
- 👛 Wallet Integration (MetaMask, WalletConnect)
- 💻 Smart Contract Workspace
- 🚀 One-Click Deployment
- 📊 Deployment History
- 🤖 AI-Powered Solidity Assistant
- 📚 Web3 Learning Hub
- 🌐 Multi-chain Support
- 👥 Team Collaboration
- 📈 Project Analytics

---

## 🏗️ System Architecture

```text
             User
               │
               ▼
        Next.js Frontend
               │
         REST API
               │
        NestJS Backend
      ┌────────┴────────┐
      ▼                 ▼
 PostgreSQL       Blockchain
      │                 │
      └────────┬────────┘
               ▼
          AI Services
```

---

## 🛠️ Planned Tech Stack

### Frontend

- Next.js
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS

### Backend

- NestJS
- Prisma ORM
- PostgreSQL

### Blockchain

- Solidity
- Hardhat
- Ethers.js

### AI

- OpenAI API

### DevOps

- Docker
- GitHub Actions
- Vercel
- Railway

---

## 📂 Project Structure

```text
nexus/

├── apps/
│   ├── web/
│   └── api/
│
├── contracts/
├── packages/
├── docs/
├── assets/
├── scripts/
├── tests/
├── .github/
├── docker/
│
├── README.md
├── LICENSE
└── .gitignore
```
